title: No license file
description: 486K-star repo with no LICENSE. All rights reserved by default. The 45,710 forks technically have no legal right to redistribute.
recommendation: Add a license (CC-BY-4.0 or MIT common for curated lists).

title: 460 open issues, 30 open PRs
description: Large backlog suggests maintenance capacity gap. Issues are primarily tutorial link submissions and broken link reports.
recommendation: Triage backlog, close stale issues, add contributing guidelines.

title: 41 days since last push
description: Last activity Feb 21, 2026. For a community-maintained list, gaps of 1-2 months may indicate declining maintainer engagement.

title: No CONTRIBUTING.md
description: Community-maintained list with 30+ contributors but no contribution guidelines. Issue template exists but no PR template.
recommendation: Add CONTRIBUTING.md with link submission format.

title: Ultra-minimal structure
description: 4 files total: README.md (the entire content), ISSUE_TEMPLATE.md, .gitattributes, banner image. All value in one file.
recommendation: None — appropriate for a curated list.

title: Security Facade
description: Copilot code review workflow on a Markdown-only repo. 3 of 4 runs failed. No functional purpose.
